Container.Name: ranked-choice-vote
Container.Overview: Self-hosted ranked-choice (instant-runoff) voting site. Admin creates votings, voters rank on mobile, results animate round by round.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Host port mapped to the app (container listens on 3000)

Config.Name: Session Secret
Config.Description: Signs the admin session cookie. Use a long random string: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: Public Vote URL
Config.Description: Optional. Public URL shown on the QR/link, e.g. https://vote.saltychart.net. Leave blank to use the browser origin.
